urdu transliteration text: Aaj bhi Zainab ki aati hai sada bhai Hussain
english translation text: Even till this day, the cries of Zainab (A.S) can be heard, calling out to her brother, O Hussain (A.S)

urdu transliteration text: Tera chehra, teri ankhain, bhol kab payi Hussain
english translation text: “When have I been able to forget your face and eyes, O Hussain (A.S)?”

urdu transliteration text:
Chaltay naakay say giraya khud ko jalti rait paar
Aaj bhi Zainab ki aati hai sada bhai Hussain
english translation text: “I dropped myself from a moving horse, onto the hot plains (of Karbala)…

urdu transliteration text: Ghutnion kay bal may teri laash tak aayi Hussain
english translation text: I crawled all the way to your corpse, O Hussain (A.S)”

urdu transliteration text: Bus may ghabrayi thi khanjar tujh pay chalta dekh kar
english translation text: “I was only petrified when I saw the dagger slit your throat…

urdu transliteration text: Phir kisi mushkil may ghir kar main na ghabrayi Hussain
english translation text: After that, no calamity would frighten me, O Hussain (A.S)”

urdu transliteration text: Kaun ta jo maarnay walon may nahi ta khubaroo
english translation text: “Who among the martyrs did not have a virtuous personality?

urdu transliteration text: Bhoolnay bethi to kis kis  - ki na yaad ay Hussain
english translation text: I kept remembering every martyr, the moment I tried to forget them, O Hussain (A.S)”

urdu transliteration text: Beh rahay thay aankh say aanso teri ruukhsat kay waqt
english translation text: “Tears were flowing from my eyes at the time of your departure…

urdu transliteration text: Phir koyi ansoo na tapka aankh pathraye Hussain
english translation text: I did not shed tears after that, for my eyes had become numb, O Hussain (A.S)”

urdu transliteration text: Hath may kozay liye sab aasman taktay rehay
english translation text: “All of us were gazing expectantly at the sky with vessels in our hands…

urdu transliteration text: Abr nay ik bond paani ki na barsayi Hussain
english translation text: However, nature did not send down even a drop of water for us, O Hussain (A.S)”

urdu transliteration text: Dekhti hoon khaake maqtal ki to bhar ata hai dil
english translation text: “My heart becomes heavy as soon as I look towards the battlefield…

urdu transliteration text: Khaak par mein kaise kaise phool chor aaee Hussain
english translation text: How many kinds of precious flowers have I left behind, O Hussain (A.S)?”

urdu transliteration text: Door uftada safar say lout kar may nay Naveed
english translation text: “When I returned from the foreign land…

urdu transliteration text: Thanda paani jab piya bas teri yaad ai Hussain
english translation text: As soon as I sipped a cup of cold water, I only remembered you O Hussain (A.S)”
